welcome_sub: A text RPG in the Alien universe
char_name_prompt: What is your character's name? Type the name below:
char_callsign_prompt: Good, {name}. What's your callsign? Type your code name:
char_background_prompt: 📋 BACKGROUND What is your operational background? This choice determines your starting stats.
bg_synthetic_desc: Panic immunity, Analysis +3, No morale bonus
psych_prompt: 🧠 PSYCHOLOGICAL TRAIT How do you react under pressure?
permadeath_prompt: ☠️ GAME MODE Do you want to activate NOSTROMO MODE? ⚠️ Permadeath active — if you die, you start over. But you'll unlock exclusive content and a secret ending.
level_up: ⬆️ LEVEL UP! You are now Level {level}! You have {points} stat points to assign. Use /profile to allocate them.
upgrade_stat_prompt: Which stat do you want to upgrade? You have {points} points available.
archive_empty: No documents found yet. Explore carefully.
daily_available: 📅 DAILY MISSION New mission available! Each completed mission grants bonus XP and rare items.
daily_done: ✅ Daily mission already completed. Come back in {hours}h {mins}m.
stress_warning: ⚠️ WARNING: Your stress level is critical. Your perceptions may not be reliable.
paranoia_trigger: 🧠 Your mind wanders... every shadow looks like a predator.
combat_vs: You come face to face with: {enemy}
attack_hit: 💥 Hit! You deal {dmg} damage. Enemy has {hp} HP remaining.
attack_miss: ❌ Missed! The Xenomorph moves too fast.
dodge_success: ✅ Dodged! The attack grazes you in the darkness.
flee_success: 🏃 You flee into the darkness. The Xenomorph shrieks behind you.
flee_fail: ❌ You can't flee! The Xenomorph blocks your path.
enemy_attack: 👾 The Xenomorph attacks! You take {dmg} damage.
combat_dead: 💀 YOU DIED Theta's darkness swallows you whole.
no_ammo: ❌ Out of ammo! You need another tactic.
chapter_locked: 🔒 CHAPTER {num} LOCKED Available in: {time} «Signals keep coming. Something moves in the dark.»
game_over_permadeath: ☠️ NOSTROMO MODE — GAME OVER You died on Prometheus Station Theta. Your story ends here. But the station keeps transmitting its dark signal... Do you want to try again?
